name: prism
description: Prism — type N prompts, get N parallel agents, reconciled into one answer.

scripts.build: npm run build:vite && npm run build:electron
scripts.release: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always && npm run release:rearm-asset
scripts.release:rearm-asset: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('gh release upload v'+v+' release/latest-mac.yml --repo rca6045407168/prism --clobber',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('[release:rearm-asset] latest-mac.yml force-overwritten for v'+v+' \u2014 v0.1.39 bug never again')}catch(e){console.warn('[release:rearm-asset] non-fatal: '+e.message)}"

build.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Richard Chen. Includes open-source components — see Credits.

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Prism needs to communicate with its local agent runtime.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Prism uses the microphone for voice input in the composer. Audio is processed by macOS's built-in dictation.
